input.test_diff:
--- a/tests/test_budget.py
+++ b/tests/test_budget.py
@@ -25,3 +25,9 @@ class TestBudget:
+    def test_add_cost_accumulates(self):
+        b = Budget(cap=10.0)
+        b.add_cost(2.5)
+        b.add_cost(3.5)
+        assert b.spent == 6.0
+        assert b.cost_remaining() == 4.0

expected_top_finding: add_cost coverage: accumulation + cost_remaining both asserted
rationale: Targets a real symbol, asserts both the mutation AND the derived property.
